APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar Apr-10-2013 Text Ruling

Application Pending For Waiver Of Additional Court Fees And Costs Pursuant To G.C. 68633, Crc 3.51, 8.26, And 8.818
Off Calendar Apr-10-2013 Text Ruling

JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-02-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Prove-Up Hearing. Judge: Donald J. Sullivan: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Sonia Wong, CSR #11288.

Plaintiff Meher Patel was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant John Burdette.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on March 11, 2013.

Exhibit A - Copy of Three-Day Notice to Pay Rent or Quit dated 2/1/13.

Exhibit B - Copy of Rent and Daily Damages Worksheet prepared by plaintiff. Undated.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Meher Patel, and against defendant John Burdette as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $1,240.00.
Holdover Damages - $2,280.00.
Costs - $275.00.

Total - $3,795.00.

Additionally, plaintiff Meher Patel is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 235 Eddy Street, #322 San Francisco, CA 94102. The rental agreement is canceled. The lease is forfeited.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Apr-02-2013 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-28-2013 Off Calendar

The trial date of April 2, 2013 remains on calendar.
